blockhelp.storage: Has internal storage that other blocks can pull from
blockhelp.storage_required: Needs an inventory here to work
blockhelp.works_when_powered: Only works while receiving a redstone signal
blockhelp.works_when_unpowered: Only works while NOT receiving a redstone signal
blockhelp.redwork.drill.front: Breaks the block it is facing
blockhelp.redwork.drill.details: Right-click with a pickaxe, axe, shovel or hoe to insert it as the Drill's tool. While powered by redstone it repeatedly mines the block in front of it using that tool, collecting the drops into its own storage and damaging the tool over time. Outputs a redstone signal based on the tool's remaining durability.
blockhelp.redwork.drill.addition: Requires a tool to mine blocks that need one
blockhelp.redwork.placer.front: Places blocks into the space it is facing
blockhelp.redwork.placer.details: Fill its storage with block items. While powered by redstone it attempts to place one block at a time into the space in front of it. If the space cannot be filled, the item is dropped instead.
blockhelp.redwork.chute.bottom: Passes items down to whatever is below
blockhelp.redwork.chute.details: Chutes stack vertically to form a shaft that moves items from the inventory above the top chute down to the inventory (or the ground) below the bottom chute. Powering any chute in the stack pauses the whole shaft.
blockhelp.redwork.extractor.details: Moves items from the inventory behind it into the inventory in front of it, one stack at a time, whenever it receives a redstone signal.
blockhelp.redwork.breeze_collector.front: Pulls in nearby items and drops
blockhelp.redwork.breeze_collector.detai: While powered by redstone, pulls nearby item entities and drops toward itself and feeds them into the inventory behind it.
blockhelp.redwork.copper_observer.front: Detects entities in the space it is facing
blockhelp.redwork.copper_observer.detail: Emits a short redstone pulse out of its back whenever an entity enters or leaves the space it is facing.
blockhelp.redwork.striker.front: Attacks whatever is standing in the space it is facing
blockhelp.redwork.striker.details: Right-click with a sword or axe to mount it as the Striker's weapon. While powered by redstone it repeatedly swings the mounted weapon at any living entity in front of it, applying the weapon's damage and enchantments and wearing it down over time. Without a weapon mounted it still attacks bare-handed. Outputs a redstone signal based on the weapon's remaining durability.
blockhelp.redwork.striker.addition: Works without a weapon, but hits much harder with one mounted
blockhelp.redwork.geode_accelerator.fron: Speeds up growth of the block it is facing
blockhelp.redwork.geode_accelerator.deta: Constantly forces extra random ticks on the block in front of it, speeding up its growth (e.g. budding amethyst). The list of eligible blocks is configurable in the mod's config.
